title: Variant Furnaces
body:
## Variant Furnaces
Adds new furnaces and furnace upgrades!

### Current Furnaces
Copper, Iron, Gold, Diamond, Emerald, Crystal, Obsidian, and Netherite Furnace.
### Current Upgrades
Fuel Augment & Speed Augment.

### Planned
- Blasting & Smoke Augments
- Other augments to upgrade/change how furnaces work?

### Known Issues
- Using the stone-copper upgrade resets remaining cook time
- Using an upgrade drops furnace xp instead of keeping it stored inside of the furnace
